name: Oxalic Acid
description: A strong dicarboxylic acid that forms stable complexes with iron and calcium, exceptionally effective at removing rust stains, tannin stains, and wood discoloration.
solubility: 143 g/L in water at 25°C; soluble in ethanol
chemistry: Complexes with iron/calcium. Dissolves rust + tannin stains. Active in Bar Keeper's Friend. Brightens wood.
